metadata.description: Turn any input into beautiful, production-ready architecture diagrams — self-contained HTML files with 5 themes, 8 topologies, infinite canvas, and zero dependencies

plugins.name: diagram-creator
plugins.description: Generate stunning architecture diagrams from any file type or text description. 8 topologies (nested, left-to-right, hub-and-spoke, timeline, grid, tree, funnel, comparison), 5 themes, infinite canvas with pan & zoom.
